import json
import os
import sys
from pathlib import Path
from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.edge.service import Service
from selenium.webdriver.edge.options import Options
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC
import time
from dotenv import load_dotenv  # 添加这行

# ========== 添加项目根目录到 Python 路径 ==========
current_dir = Path(__file__).resolve().parent
project_root = current_dir.parent.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(project_root))

# ========== 手动加载 .env 文件 ==========
env_path = project_root / '.env'
if env_path.exists():
    load_dotenv(env_path)
    print(f"✅ 已加载 .env 文件: {env_path}")
else:
    print(f"⚠️ .env 文件不存在: {env_path}")
# ========================================

# 现在可以正确导入
from app.utils.db import supabase_request, get_supabase_url, get_supabase_key
# ========== 路径配置 ==========
# 获取项目根目录（复用上面的 project_root）
BASE_DIR = str(project_root)
# =============================

# ========== 精准配置 ==========
EDGE_DRIVER_PATH = r"D:\Mine\Download\edge download\edgedriver_win64\msedgedriver.exe"
TARGET_URL = "http://job.mohrss.gov.cn/cjobs/institution/listInstitution"
JSONL_FILE = os.path.join(BASE_DIR, "data", "news", "Recruitment_News.jsonl")
LINK_FEATURE = "/SYrlzyhshbzb/fwyd/SYkaoshizhaopin/"

# ========== 数据库配置 ==========
DB_TABLE = "knowledge_articles"  # 使用测试成功的表名
DEFAULT_CATEGORY = "中华人民共和国人力资源和社会保障部"
# ================================================

# 全局变量（自增ID+查重）
title_duplicate_set = set()
current_auto_id = 1

def load_existing_data():
    """加载历史数据，初始化自增ID和查重集合"""
    global current_auto_id, title_duplicate_set
    if os.path.exists(JSONL_FILE):
        try:
            max_id = 0
            with open(JSONL_FILE, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                for line in f:
                    line = line.strip()
                    if line:
                        data = json.loads(line)
                        if "title" in data:
                            title_duplicate_set.add(data["title"])
                        if "id" in data and isinstance(data["id"], int):
                            max_id = max(max_id, data["id"])
            current_auto_id = max_id + 1
            print(f"✅ 加载历史数据完成")
            print(f"   - 历史不重复标题数：{len(title_duplicate_set)}")
            print(f"   - 下一个自增ID：{current_auto_id}")
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"⚠️ 加载历史数据失败：{e}，将从ID=1重新开始")
            current_auto_id = 1
            title_duplicate_set = set()
    else:
        print(f"ℹ️ 无历史数据，ID从1开始爬取")

def init_edge_driver():
    """初始化Edge浏览器（无头模式，完全隐藏窗口）"""
    edge_options = Options()
    # ========== 核心：开启无头模式（无浏览器窗口） ==========
    edge_options.add_argument("--headless=new")  # 新版Edge无头模式
    edge_options.add_argument("--disable-blink-features=AutomationControlled")
    edge_options.add_experimental_option("excludeSwitches", ["enable-automation"])
    edge_options.add_experimental_option("useAutomationExtension", False)
    edge_options.add_argument("--start-maximized")  # 最大化无头窗口（避免元素遮挡）
    edge_options.add_argument("--window-size=1920,1080")  # 设置窗口分辨率
    edge_options.add_argument("--disable-gpu")  # 禁用GPU加速（无头模式必需）
    edge_options.add_argument("--no-sandbox")  # 取消沙箱模式
    edge_options.add_argument("--log-level=3")  # 关闭日志输出，减少干扰
    
    # 初始化驱动
    service = Service(EDGE_DRIVER_PATH)
    driver = webdriver.Edge(service=service, options=edge_options)
    # 移除webdriver标识（关键：模拟真人）
    driver.execute_script("Object.defineProperty(navigator, 'webdriver', {get: () => undefined})")
    driver.implicitly_wait(10)  # 全局隐式等待
    return driver

def extract_page_data(driver, page_num):
    """提取当前页面所有有效数据（精准匹配你的页面结构）"""
    global current_auto_id
    page_new_data = []
    
    # 等待页面数据加载完成
    WebDriverWait(driver, 15).until(
        EC.presence_of_element_located((By.CLASS_NAME, "zhaopin-title"))
    )
    time.sleep(1)  # 额外等待1秒，确保数据完全渲染
    
    # 1. 提取所有标题列（zhaopin-title）
    title_tds = driver.find_elements(By.CLASS_NAME, "zhaopin-title")
    # 2. 提取所有时间列（width="240px"）
    time_tds = driver.find_elements(By.XPATH, "//td[@width='240px']")
    
    print(f"\n🔍 第{page_num}页：找到 {len(title_tds)} 条招聘信息，{len(time_tds)} 个发布时间")
    
    # 一一对应提取数据
    for i in range(min(len(title_tds), len(time_tds))):
        try:
            # 提取标题和链接
            title_td = title_tds[i]
            a_tag = title_td.find_element(By.TAG_NAME, "a")
            title = a_tag.text.strip()
            link = a_tag.get_attribute("href").strip()
            
            # 提取发布时间（精准匹配width="240px"的td）
            publish_time = time_tds[i].text.strip()
            
            # 过滤无效数据
            if not title or not link or len(publish_time) != 10:
                continue
            
            # 标题查重：跳过重复内容
            if title in title_duplicate_set:
                print(f"⏭️ 跳过重复标题（ID={current_auto_id}）：{title[:30]}...")
                continue
            
            # 组装数据（自增ID）
            news_item = {
                "id": current_auto_id,
                "page": page_num,  # 保留页码便于溯源（不需要可删除）
                "title": title,
                "link": link,
                "publish_time": publish_time
            }
            page_new_data.append(news_item)
            title_duplicate_set.add(title)
            current_auto_id += 1  # ID自增
        
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"⚠️ 第{page_num}页第{i+1}条数据提取失败：{str(e)[:60]}")
            continue
    
    print(f"✅ 第{page_num}页：新增 {len(page_new_data)} 条不重复数据（当前最大ID={current_auto_id-1}）")
    return page_new_data

def get_page_info(driver):
    """获取当前页码和总页数"""
    try:
        allpage_input = driver.find_element(By.ID, "allpage")
        nowpage_input = driver.find_element(By.ID, "nowpage")
        total_page = int(allpage_input.get_attribute("value"))
        now_page = int(nowpage_input.get_attribute("value"))
        return now_page, total_page
    except:
        return 1, 6  # 默认值

def click_next_page(driver, current_page):
    """点击下一页（通过执行JavaScript函数）"""
    try:
        # 方法1：直接执行JavaScript的翻页函数（最可靠）
        driver.execute_script("_gotoNextPage();")
        print(f"📝 执行JavaScript翻页函数 _gotoNextPage()")
        return True
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"⚠️ JavaScript翻页失败：{e}")
        
        try:
            # 方法2：尝试点击下一页按钮
            next_button = driver.find_element(By.ID, "next")
            driver.execute_script("arguments[0].click();", next_button)
            print(f"📝 点击下一页按钮")
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"⚠️ 点击按钮翻页失败：{e}")
            
            try:
                # 方法3：直接构造URL翻页
                next_url = f"http://job.mohrss.gov.cn/cjobs/institution/listInstitution?pageNo={current_page + 1}&origin="
                driver.get(next_url)
                print(f"📝 直接访问URL翻页：{next_url}")
                return True
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"❌ 所有翻页方法都失败：{e}")
                return False

def crawl_all_pages():
    """核心：无头模式下爬取所有页面"""
    driver = init_edge_driver()
    all_new_data = []
    
    # 第一步：访问目标页，爬取第1页
    driver.get(TARGET_URL)
    print(f"\n🚀 开始爬取第 1 页（初始页）")
    page1_data = extract_page_data(driver, 1)
    all_new_data.extend(page1_data)
    
    # 获取总页数
    try:
        allpage_input = WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(
            EC.presence_of_element_located((By.ID, "allpage"))
        )
        total_page = int(allpage_input.get_attribute("value"))
        print(f"📊 总页数：{total_page} 页")
    except:
        total_page = 6  # 默认6页
        print(f"⚠️ 无法获取总页数，默认设置为 {total_page} 页")
    
    # 循环爬取剩余页面
    for page_num in range(2, total_page + 1):
        try:
            print(f"\n📝 准备爬取第 {page_num} 页")
            
            # 等待并获取当前页码，确认可以翻页
            time.sleep(2)
            
            # 执行翻页
            if not click_next_page(driver, page_num - 1):
                print(f"❌ 无法翻到第 {page_num} 页，停止爬取")
                break
            
            # 等待页面加载完成（通过URL变化或特定元素）
            WebDriverWait(driver, 15).until(
                EC.url_contains(f"pageNo={page_num}")
            )
            print(f"✅ URL已更新到第 {page_num} 页")
            
            # 额外等待页面内容加载
            time.sleep(2)
            
            # 验证当前页码是否正确
            try:
                now_page, _ = get_page_info(driver)
                if now_page != page_num:
                    print(f"⚠️ 页码不匹配：当前显示第{now_page}页，期望第{page_num}页")
                    # 尝试直接通过URL访问
                    url = f"http://job.mohrss.gov.cn/cjobs/institution/listInstitution?pageNo={page_num}&origin="
                    driver.get(url)
                    time.sleep(2)
            except:
                pass
            
            # 提取当前页数据
            page_data = extract_page_data(driver, page_num)
            all_new_data.extend(page_data)
            
            # 如果没有新数据，可以继续爬取（可能都是重复的）
            
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"❌ 第{page_num}页爬取失败：{str(e)[:80]}")
            # 尝试直接URL访问作为备选
            try:
                url = f"http://job.mohrss.gov.cn/cjobs/institution/listInstitution?pageNo={page_num}&origin="
                driver.get(url)
                time.sleep(3)
                page_data = extract_page_data(driver, page_num)
                all_new_data.extend(page_data)
            except:
                print(f"❌ 备选方案也失败，停止爬取")
                break
    
    # 关闭浏览器
    driver.quit()
    return all_new_data

# ========== 新增的数据库保存函数 ==========
def save_to_database(news_items):
    """保存数据到数据库（新增功能，不影响原有逻辑）"""
    if not news_items:
        return
    
    # 检查数据库连接
    try:
        supabase_url = get_supabase_url()
        supabase_key = get_supabase_key()
        if not supabase_url or not supabase_key:
            print("⚠️ 数据库配置不完整，跳过数据库保存")
            return
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"⚠️ 数据库配置检查失败：{e}，跳过数据库保存")
        return
    
    success_count = 0
    for item in news_items:
        try:
            # 转换数据格式以适配数据库表
            db_item = {
                "title": item["title"],
                "source_url": item["link"],
                "publish_date": item["publish_time"],  # 发布时间
                "category": DEFAULT_CATEGORY,
                "content_text": "",  # 暂时为空
                # 不传id，让数据库自增
                # 不传page字段
            }
            
            # 插入到数据库
            result = supabase_request(
                method="POST",
                endpoint=f"/rest/v1/{DB_TABLE}",
                json_data=db_item
            )
            success_count += 1
            print(f"✅ 已保存到数据库: {item['title'][:30]}...")
            
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"❌ 保存到数据库失败: {item['title'][:30]}... - {e}")
    
    if success_count > 0:
        print(f"📊 数据库保存完成：成功 {success_count}/{len(news_items)} 条")

def save_to_jsonl(new_data):
    """保存数据：合并历史+新增，保证ID连续、无重复标题（原有功能不变）"""
    # 读取历史数据
    history_data = []
    if os.path.exists(JSONL_FILE):
        try:
            with open(JSONL_FILE, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                history_data = [json.loads(line.strip()) for line in f if line.strip()]
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"⚠️ 读取历史数据失败：{e}，将覆盖原有文件")
            history_data = []
    
    # 合并数据 + 全局去重 + 按ID排序
    all_data = history_data + new_data
    unique_data = []
    unique_titles = set()
    for item in all_data:
        if item["title"] not in unique_titles:
            unique_titles.add(item["title"])
            unique_data.append(item)
    # 按ID升序排列，保证ID连续
    unique_data.sort(key=lambda x: x["id"])
    
    # 写入JSONL文件
    try:
        with open(JSONL_FILE, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            for item in unique_data:
                json_line = json.dumps(item, ensure_ascii=False)
                f.write(json_line + "\n")
        
        print(f"\n📄 JSONL文件保存成功！")
        print(f"📁 文件路径：{os.path.abspath(JSONL_FILE)}")
        if unique_data:
            print(f"📈 总计数据：{len(unique_data)} 条（ID范围：1~{unique_data[-1]['id']}）")
        print(f"🔍 本次新增：{len(new_data)} 条不重复数据")
    except PermissionError:
        print(f"\n❌ 权限错误！请关闭打开的 {JSONL_FILE} 文件后重试")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"\n❌ 保存失败：{str(e)}")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    print("="*60)
    print("🚀 事业单位招聘信息爬取（Edge无头模式 + 数据库存储）")
    print("="*60)
    
    # 1. 加载历史数据初始化
    load_existing_data()
    
    # 2. 爬取所有页面数据（无浏览器窗口）- 原有逻辑完全不变
    new_data = crawl_all_pages()
    
    # 3. 保存数据到JSONL（原有功能）
    save_to_jsonl(new_data)
    
    # 4. 新增：保存数据到数据库（不影响原有流程）
    if new_data:
        save_to_database(new_data)
    else:
        print("ℹ️ 没有新数据需要保存到数据库")
    
    print("\n🎉 所有爬取任务完成！")

#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
人社部热点资讯爬虫（位于 app/utils/ 目录）
"""

import json
import os
import sys
from pathlib import Path
from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.edge.service import Service
from selenium.webdriver.edge.options import Options
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC
import time
import re
from dotenv import load_dotenv

# ========== 添加项目根目录到 Python 路径 ==========
# 当前文件: app/utils/test_crawler.py
current_dir = Path(__file__).resolve().parent  # app/utils
app_dir = current_dir.parent  # app
project_root = app_dir.parent  # demolition-brigade 根目录

sys.path.insert(0, str(project_root))

print(f"项目根目录: {project_root}")

# ========== 手动加载 .env 文件 ==========
env_path = project_root / '.env'
if env_path.exists():
    load_dotenv(env_path)
    print(f"✅ 已加载 .env 文件: {env_path}")
else:
    print(f"⚠️ .env 文件不存在: {env_path}")
    # 尝试在父目录查找
    alt_env = project_root.parent / '.env'
    if alt_env.exists():
        load_dotenv(alt_env)
        print(f"✅ 已加载 .env 文件: {alt_env}")
# ========================================

# 现在可以正确导入
try:
    from app.utils.db import supabase_request, get_supabase_url, get_supabase_key
    print("✅ 成功导入数据库模块")
except ImportError as e:
    print(f"⚠️ 导入数据库模块失败: {e}")
    print("将只保存数据到 JSONL 文件")

# ========== 精准配置 ==========
EDGE_DRIVER_PATH = r"D:\Mine\Download\edge download\edgedriver_win64\msedgedriver.exe"
TARGET_URL = "http://job.mohrss.gov.cn/rdzx/index.jhtml"

# 动态获取文件路径
BASE_DIR = str(project_root)
JSONL_FILE = os.path.join(BASE_DIR, "data", "news", "Hot_News.jsonl")
JSONL_FILE = os.path.abspath(JSONL_FILE)

HEADLESS_MODE = True  # True=无头模式，False=显示浏览器窗口

# ========== 数据库配置 ==========
DB_TABLE = "news_record"
DEFAULT_CATEGORY = "中华人民共和国人力资源和社会保障部-热点资讯"
# ================================================

print(f"📁 数据保存路径：{JSONL_FILE}")
print(f"📁 目录是否存在：{os.path.exists(os.path.dirname(JSONL_FILE))}")

# 确保目录存在
os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(JSONL_FILE), exist_ok=True)

# 全局变量（自增ID+查重）
title_duplicate_set = set()
current_auto_id = 1

def load_existing_data():
    """加载历史数据，初始化自增ID和查重集合"""
    global current_auto_id, title_duplicate_set
    if os.path.exists(JSONL_FILE):
        try:
            max_id = 0
            with open(JSONL_FILE, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                for line in f:
                    line = line.strip()
                    if line:
                        data = json.loads(line)
                        if "title" in data:
                            title_duplicate_set.add(data["title"])
                        if "id" in data and isinstance(data["id"], int):
                            max_id = max(max_id, data["id"])
            current_auto_id = max_id + 1
            print(f"✅ 加载历史数据完成")
            print(f"   - 历史不重复标题数：{len(title_duplicate_set)}")
            print(f"   - 下一个自增ID：{current_auto_id}")
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"⚠️ 加载历史数据失败：{e}，将从ID=1重新开始")
            current_auto_id = 1
            title_duplicate_set = set()
    else:
        print(f"ℹ️ 无历史数据，ID从1开始爬取")

def init_edge_driver():
    """初始化Edge浏览器（可选无头模式）"""
    edge_options = Options()
    
    if HEADLESS_MODE:
        # 无头模式配置
        edge_options.add_argument("--headless=new")
        edge_options.add_argument("--disable-gpu")
        edge_options.add_argument("--window-size=1920,1080")
        edge_options.add_argument("--no-sandbox")
    else:
        # 有头模式（调试用）
        edge_options.add_argument("--start-maximized")
        edge_options.add_argument("--window-size=1920,1080")
    
    # 通用配置
    edge_options.add_argument("--disable-blink-features=AutomationControlled")
    edge_options.add_experimental_option("excludeSwitches", ["enable-automation"])
    edge_options.add_experimental_option("useAutomationExtension", False)
    edge_options.add_argument("--log-level=3")
    
    # 初始化驱动
    service = Service(EDGE_DRIVER_PATH)
    driver = webdriver.Edge(service=service, options=edge_options)
    driver.execute_script("Object.defineProperty(navigator, 'webdriver', {get: () => undefined})")
    driver.implicitly_wait(10)
    return driver

def extract_news_from_page(driver, page_num=1):
    """从当前页面提取所有新闻数据"""
    global current_auto_id
    page_new_data = []
    
    # 等待页面加载完成，等待新闻链接出现
    WebDriverWait(driver, 15).until(
        EC.presence_of_element_located((By.CSS_SELECTOR, "a.blue-light"))
    )
    time.sleep(1)
    
    # 提取所有class="blue-light"的a标签（新闻标题和链接）
    news_links = driver.find_elements(By.CSS_SELECTOR, "a.blue-light")
    
    print(f"\n🔍 第{page_num}页：找到 {len(news_links)} 条新闻链接")
    
    for i, link_element in enumerate(news_links):
        try:
            # 提取标题和链接
            title = link_element.text.strip()
            link = link_element.get_attribute("href").strip()
            
            # 过滤无效数据
            if not title or not link:
                continue
            
            # 标题查重
            if title in title_duplicate_set:
                print(f"⏭️ 跳过重复标题：{title[:40]}...")
                continue
            
            # 提取发布时间（从兄弟元素或父元素中的span.floatright）
            publish_time = extract_publish_time(link_element)
            
            # 组装数据
            news_item = {
                "id": current_auto_id,
                "page": page_num,
                "title": title,
                "link": link,
                "publish_time": publish_time,
                "source": "人社部热点资讯"
            }
            page_new_data.append(news_item)
            title_duplicate_set.add(title)
            print(f"✅ 第{page_num}页第{i+1}条：{title[:50]}... ({publish_time})")
            current_auto_id += 1
            
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"⚠️ 第{page_num}页第{i+1}条数据提取失败：{str(e)[:60]}")
            continue
    
    print(f"📊 第{page_num}页：新增 {len(page_new_data)} 条不重复数据")
    return page_new_data

def extract_publish_time(link_element):
    """提取发布时间：从span class='floatright font12 gray'中提取"""
    try:
        # 策略1：查找父级元素中的时间span
        parent = link_element.find_element(By.XPATH, "..")
        
        time_span = parent.find_elements(By.CSS_SELECTOR, "span.floatright.font12.gray")
        if time_span:
            time_text = time_span[0].text.strip()
            if time_text and re.match(r'\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}', time_text):
                return time_text
        
        # 策略2：查找父级的父级
        grand_parent = link_element.find_element(By.XPATH, "../..")
        time_span = grand_parent.find_elements(By.CSS_SELECTOR, "span.floatright.font12.gray")
        if time_span:
            time_text = time_span[0].text.strip()
            if time_text and re.match(r'\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}', time_text):
                return time_text
        
        # 策略3：查找兄弟元素中的时间
        sibling_time = link_element.find_elements(By.XPATH, "following-sibling::span[contains(@class, 'floatright')]")
        if sibling_time:
            time_text = sibling_time[0].text.strip()
            if time_text and re.match(r'\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}', time_text):
                return time_text
        
        return "时间未知"
        
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"时间提取异常：{e}")
        return "时间未知"

def get_total_pages(driver):
    """获取总页数（通过分析下一页链接）"""
    try:
        pagination_links = driver.find_elements(By.CSS_SELECTOR, ".page a, a[onclick*='index_']")
        
        max_page = 1
        for link in pagination_links:
            onclick = link.get_attribute("onclick") or ""
            href = link.get_attribute("href") or ""
            
            if "index_" in onclick:
                match = re.search(r'index_(\d+)\.jhtml', onclick)
                if match:
                    page_num = int(match.group(1))
                    max_page = max(max_page, page_num)
            
            if "index_" in href:
                match = re.search(r'index_(\d+)\.jhtml', href)
                if match:
                    page_num = int(match.group(1))
                    max_page = max(max_page, page_num)
        
        if max_page > 1:
            print(f"📊 通过分页链接识别到总页数：{max_page}")
            return max_page
        
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"⚠️ 获取总页数失败：{e}")
    
    return 5

def go_to_next_page(driver, current_page):
    """点击下一页"""
    try:
        next_links = driver.find_elements(By.XPATH, "//a[contains(@onclick, 'index_') and contains(text(), '下一页')]")
        
        if next_links:
            print(f"📝 找到下一页链接，点击跳转到第{current_page + 1}页")
            driver.execute_script("arguments[0].click();", next_links[0])
            time.sleep(2)
            return True
        
        next_url = TARGET_URL.replace("index.jhtml", f"index_{current_page + 1}.jhtml")
        print(f"📝 直接构造URL：{next_url}")
        driver.get(next_url)
        time.sleep(2)
        return True
        
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"❌ 翻页失败：{e}")
        return False

def crawl_all_pages():
    """爬取所有页面的新闻"""
    driver = init_edge_driver()
    all_new_data = []
    
    try:
        print(f"\n🚀 开始爬取首页：{TARGET_URL}")
        driver.get(TARGET_URL)
        time.sleep(2)
        
        page1_data = extract_news_from_page(driver, page_num=1)
        all_new_data.extend(page1_data)
        
        total_pages = get_total_pages(driver)
        print(f"\n📊 预计总页数：{total_pages} 页")
        
        for page_num in range(2, total_pages + 1):
            print(f"\n{'='*50}")
            print(f"📝 准备爬取第 {page_num} 页")
            
            if not go_to_next_page(driver, page_num - 1):
                print(f"❌ 无法翻到第 {page_num} 页，停止爬取")
                break
            
            WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(
                EC.presence_of_element_located((By.CSS_SELECTOR, "a.blue-light"))
            )
            time.sleep(1.5)
            
            current_url = driver.current_url
            print(f"📍 当前URL：{current_url}")
            
            page_data = extract_news_from_page(driver, page_num=page_num)
            all_new_data.extend(page_data)
            
            if len(page_data) == 0:
                print(f"⚠️ 第{page_num}页无数据，可能已到达最后一页")
                break
            
            time.sleep(1)
    
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"❌ 爬取过程出错：{e}")
        import traceback
        traceback.print_exc()
    
    finally:
        driver.quit()
    
    return all_new_data

# ========== 数据库保存函数 ==========
def save_to_database(news_items):
    """保存数据到数据库"""
    if not news_items:
        return
    
    # 检查数据库模块是否可用
    try:
        from app.utils.db import supabase_request, get_supabase_url, get_supabase_key
    except ImportError:
        print("⚠️ 数据库模块不可用，跳过数据库保存")
        return
    
    try:
        supabase_url = get_supabase_url()
        supabase_key = get_supabase_key()
        if not supabase_url or not supabase_key:
            print("⚠️ 数据库配置不完整，跳过数据库保存")
            return
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"⚠️ 数据库配置检查失败：{e}，跳过数据库保存")
        return
    
    success_count = 0
    for item in news_items:
        try:
            # 根据 news_record 表的实际字段构建数据
            db_item = {
                "title": item["title"],
                "source_url": item["link"],
                "publish_date": item["publish_time"],
                "category": DEFAULT_CATEGORY,
                "content_text": "",  # 暂时为空
            }
            
            # 插入到数据库
            result = supabase_request(
                method="POST",
                endpoint=f"/rest/v1/{DB_TABLE}",
                json_data=db_item
            )
            success_count += 1
            print(f"✅ 已保存到数据库: {item['title'][:30]}...")
            
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"❌ 保存到数据库失败: {item['title'][:30]}... - {e}")
    
    if success_count > 0:
        print(f"📊 数据库保存完成：成功 {success_count}/{len(news_items)} 条")

def save_to_jsonl(new_data):
    """保存数据到JSONL文件"""
    if not new_data:
        print("\n⚠️ 没有新数据需要保存")
        return
    
    history_data = []
    if os.path.exists(JSONL_FILE):
        try:
            with open(JSONL_FILE, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                history_data = [json.loads(line.strip()) for line in f if line.strip()]
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"⚠️ 读取历史数据失败：{e}，将覆盖原有文件")
            history_data = []
    
    all_data = history_data + new_data
    unique_data = []
    unique_titles = set()
    for item in all_data:
        if item["title"] not in unique_titles:
            unique_titles.add(item["title"])
            unique_data.append(item)
    
    unique_data.sort(key=lambda x: x["id"])
    
    try:
        with open(JSONL_FILE, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            for item in unique_data:
                json_line = json.dumps(item, ensure_ascii=False)
                f.write(json_line + "\n")
        
        print(f"\n{'='*60}")
        print(f"📄 JSONL文件保存成功！")
        print(f"📁 文件路径：{os.path.abspath(JSONL_FILE)}")
        if unique_data:
            print(f"📈 总计数据：{len(unique_data)} 条（ID范围：{unique_data[0]['id']}~{unique_data[-1]['id']}）")
        print(f"🔍 本次新增：{len(new_data)} 条不重复数据")
        print(f"{'='*60}")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"\n❌ 保存失败：{str(e)}")

def main():
    print("="*60)
    print("🚀 人社部热点资讯爬虫")
    print(f"📍 目标网址：{TARGET_URL}")
    print(f"🎯 运行模式：{'无头模式（后台静默运行）' if HEADLESS_MODE else '有头模式（可见浏览器窗口）'}")
    print(f"💾 数据库表名：{DB_TABLE}")
    print("="*60)
    
    # 加载历史数据
    load_existing_data()
    
    # 爬取数据
    new_data = crawl_all_pages()
    
    # 保存到JSONL
    save_to_jsonl(new_data)
    
    # 保存到数据库
    if new_data:
        save_to_database(new_data)
    else:
        print("ℹ️ 没有新数据需要保存到数据库")
    
    print("\n🎉 爬取任务全部完成！")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

from flask import Flask

def create_app():
    app = Flask(__name__)
    
    # 注册蓝图
    from app.api.login import login_bp
    app.register_blueprint(login_bp)

    from app.api.match import match_bp
    app.register_blueprint(match_bp)

    from app.api.roadmap import roadmap_bp
    app.register_blueprint(roadmap_bp)

    from app.api.recommend import recommend_bp
    app.register_blueprint(recommend_bp)
    
    return app
